from.condition: For the chosen admissible pair (m,C), |det K_X(I_v,C)| >= c0 for some constant c0 > 0.

to.condition: For the chosen admissible pair (m,C), det K_X(I_v,C) is nonzero at the true law; equivalently, |det K_X(I_v,C)| >= c0 for some constant c0 > 0.

changes.from: { C = (C_1,...,C_q) in (V^{m-2})^q : outside a proper algebraic subset of parameter pairs (Lambda,epsilon) satisfying ass:linear-mixed-representation and ass:connected-set-markov on G, for each r in {1,...,q} there exists a nonzero scalar A_r(Lambda,epsilon) independent of s such that kappa_X(i_r,p_s,C_r) = A_r(Lambda,epsilon) (B_Lambda)_{p_s,i_r} for every s in {1,...,q} and kappa_X(i_r,v,C_r) = A_r(Lambda,epsilon) (B_Lambda)_{v,i_r} }
changes.to: { C = (C_1,...,C_q) in (V^{m-2})^q : outside a proper algebraic subset of parameter pairs (Lambda,epsilon) satisfying ass:linear-mixed-representation and ass:connected-set-markov on G, the witness-specific observable row-uniform transfer already holds, meaning that for each r in {1,...,q} there exists a nonzero scalar A_r(Lambda,epsilon) independent of s such that kappa_X(i_r,p_s,C_r) = A_r(Lambda,epsilon) (B_Lambda)_{p_s,i_r} for every s in {1,...,q} and kappa_X(i_r,v,C_r) = A_r(Lambda,epsilon) (B_Lambda)_{v,i_r} }
